global.title: Inside Lectron’s factory in China: how its EV chargers are made
global.summary: Whether you know the Lectron name or not, there’s a good chance you’ve used one of its EV charging adapters. global.title: Kia’s next electric van looks even bigger in person [Video]
global.summary: Kia’s first electric van is already becoming a global sensation. The PV7 is set to go on sale soon, serving as the bigger sibling to the PV5. Here’s our first look at it.

global.title: BYD’s electric GT resurfaces after its first public sighting
global.summary: A year after the Song L GT was revealed, BYD’s electric GT was spotted in public for the first time.

global.title: ChargePoint adds 200+ new EV charging ports in the Southeast
global.summary: ChargePoint is expanding its partnership with charge point operator Optimus Energy Solutions to install more than 200 new public EV charging ports across the southeastern US.

global.summary: This week’s Tuesday Green Deals are being led by Anker’s freshly launched Summer Power Sale with up to 49% power station discounts – plus, our exclusive bonus 5% savings code. global.title: This tiny EV is now on sale in the US for less than $14,000
global.summary: The Topolino is about the size of a golf cart, but it’s actually a street-legal EV with an electric range of up to 46 miles.

global.title: Someone is trying to flip a new Rivian R2 for $80,000 — $20K over MSRP
global.summary: A private seller in Littleton, Colorado has listed a brand-new 2027 Rivian R2 Performance on Cars.com for $79,900 — roughly $20,000 over what Rivian charges for the same vehicle. global.title: Tesla launches startup challenge to scale Giga Berlin battery cells
global.summary: Tesla is opening the doors of its Gigafactory Berlin-Brandenburg to outside startups through a new “Cell Giga Challenge,” inviting them to pilot technologies inside its live battery cell production line. The program comes as Tesla ramps 4680 cell output at Grünheide toward a planned 18 GWh of annual

global.title: Ford’s $30,000 EV pickup makes this full-size SUV look massive
global.summary: Ford’s midsize electric pickup was caught driving next to an Expedition, offering a better idea of its true size compared to the three-row SUV.

global.title: Ford is recalling over 42,000 Mustang Mach-E EVs
global.summary: Ford is recalling nearly 43,000 Mustang Mach-E electric vehicles. This time, it’s due to a faulty differential unit that may fracture, resulting in a loss of drive power.
